prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: DIHYDROFOLATE REDUCTASE COMPLEXED WITH METHOTREXATE, NMR, 21 STRUCTURES. Entity description: DIHYDROFOLATE REDUCTASE. Entry keywords: OXIDOREDUCTASE OXIDOREDUCTASE, INHIBITOR-ENZYME COMPLEX. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.419753; mean_interface=0.283729; max_segment_membrane_density=0.761905; mean_disorder=0.154092. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 generic complex control source. generic_complex_only generic complex only; complex annotation alone is not biological_oligomer_context, not obligate assembly, and not assembly_required_core.
